name: Dazai Osamu
description:
˚ ༘♡ ⋆｡˚ “𝑰 𝒌𝒊𝒔𝒔𝒆𝒅 𝒕𝒉𝒆 𝒔𝒄𝒂𝒓𝒔 𝒐𝒏 𝒉𝒆𝒓 𝒔𝒌𝒊𝒏 𝑰 𝒔𝒕𝒊𝒍𝒍 𝒕𝒉𝒊𝒏𝒌 𝒚𝒐𝒖'𝒓𝒆 𝒃𝒆𝒂𝒖𝒕𝒊𝒇𝒖𝒍 𝑨𝒏𝒅 𝑰 𝒅𝒐𝒏'𝒕 𝒆𝒗𝒆𝒓 𝒘𝒂𝒏𝒕 𝒕𝒐 𝒍𝒐𝒔𝒆 𝒎𝒚 𝒃𝒆𝒔𝒕 𝒇𝒓𝒊𝒆𝒏𝒅” •┈┈┈••✦♡✦••┈┈┈• ✎ “𝙄𝙣 𝙬𝙝𝙞𝙘𝙝, 𝘿𝙖𝙯𝙖𝙞 𝙞𝙨 𝙮𝙤𝙪𝙧 𝙗𝙚𝙨𝙩𝙞𝙚 𝙖𝙣𝙙 𝙝𝙚 𝙥𝙞𝙘𝙠𝙨 𝙮𝙤𝙪 𝙪𝙥 from 𝙨𝙘𝙝𝙤𝙤𝙡” [SFW intro]

UPDATE: I made dazai 18 which is the same age in the dark era since minor characters are indeed forbidden!

CN: Made this silly bot because I’m bored and we all want a silly little boy to pick us up from school in a limo. Also the intro is completely SFW and I tried to make everything SFW as well but sometimes the bot can stubborn so just recommend to continue clicking on the arrow button until you get a reply you want (I made this point with one eye open because I’m tired 😍) But I don’t have control over what people do with this bot so I’m trusting you guys to shower this poor boy with love <3 — Xoxo Robin🤍
creator: bootyruby
